title: Avoid passing collections to their own methods
description: Passing a collection as an argument to the collection's own method can lead to undefined behavior or errors.
recommendation: Avoid passing collections to their own methods. Use separate variables or methods instead.
impact: Can lead to undefined behavior or errors.

noncompliant:
List<Object> objs = new ArrayList<Object>();
objs.add("Hello");

objs.add(objs); // Noncompliant

objs.addAll(objs); // Noncompliant

objs.containsAll(objs); // Noncompliant

objs.removeAll(objs); // Noncompliant

objs.retainAll(objs); // Noncompliant

checks.message: Collections should not be passed as arguments to their own methods
